name: Mangels Industrial S.A.
summary: Mangels Industrial S.A. primarily produces and sells aluminum wheels for the automotive industry in Brazil and internationally. It supplies wheels to the car industry, motorcycles, trucks, buses, appliances, and gas companies; liquefied petroleum gas cylinders; air tanks for heavy vehicles, agricultural machinery, and air compressors; rear axles for light vehicles; and rolls, blanks, and sheets of low carbon and high strength steel for use in motorcycles, electronics and accessories, and hardware components. The company was formerly known as Mangels & Kreutzberg Ltda. and changed its name to Mangels Industrial S.A. in 1963. Mangels Industrial S.A. was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Campos Gerais, Brazil.
